title: bryobium subclausum
intro: Bryobium subclausum is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the subclausum orchid. This plant is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in the regions where it is native, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bryobium subclausum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve pain. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often dried and made into infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
